Container.Name: Rackula-API
Container.Overview: API sidecar for Rackula that provides persistent storage for rack layouts. This container must be started before the main Rackula frontend container. The container name must match the API_HOST setting in the Rackula frontend container (default: rackula-api).

Config.Name: Data
Config.Description: Persistent storage for Rackula rack layouts. Note: The directory must be writable by container user (uid 1001). After creation run: chown -R 1001:1001 /mnt/user/appdata/Rackula/data

Config.Name: RACKULA_API_PORT
Config.Description: Port the API listens on inside the container. Must match API_PORT in the Rackula frontend container.

Config.Name: CORS_ORIGIN
Config.Description: Allowed browser origin for API CORS. Set to your Rackula frontend URL (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:8080).

Config.Name: RACKULA_API_WRITE_TOKEN
Config.Description: Optional secret token to protect API write (PUT/DELETE) routes. Must match API_WRITE_TOKEN in the Rackula frontend container.

Config.Name: DATA_DIR
Config.Description: Path to data directory inside the container.
